description: Make all your trekking activities more enjoyable with the Rockridge shoes from fila. Team them with jeans and tees for a cool casual look.Upper Full nubuck upper with stitched detailing for extended durability Mesh lining for ventilation Mesh overlay around the sockliner for breathability Padded sockliner for snug Fit Heavily cushioned synthetic tongue with double mesh lining for snug fit and comfort Central lacing with metallic eyelets and knit laces for added durability Midsole Full length compression moulded EVA with added cushioning and multi-directional flexibility Thin forefoot synthetic overlay with a Frame Flex Chassis for added support without adding bulk or weight Outsole TPR outsole for durability Horrizontal lug in wave patterns combined with full-length Gryptonite outsole for enhanced traction shoe careRub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
